**Investigation Title**
Brief title of the investigation scenario.

**Threat Category**
- [ ] Phishing
- [ ] Ransomware
- [ ] Insider Threat
- [ ] Lateral Movement
- [ ] Malware Beaconing
- [ ] Data Exfiltration
- [ ] Other

**Description & Attack Vectors**
Detail the technical sequence of the attack.

**Required Telemetry Sources**
- [ ] Sysmon EVTX
- [ ] TShark PCAP
- [ ] Nmap XML
- [ ] Threat Intelligence API
